monthly_fixed_operating_cost_dkk.rationale: Bottom-up: 2 FTE-equivalent instructor pay at Greenlandic rates plus lease, utilities baseline, admin, and amortised materials; base sits near the implicit 142K DKK/month ceiling (1.7M DKK / 12 months).

off_peak_hours_per_month.rationale: Open-studio capacity outside instructor-led courses; base assumes ~5 hr/day × 5 days/week × 4.33 weeks net of course time, with wide spread for scheduling flexibility.

low_season_utilization_actual_share.rationale: Risk 1 names Nov–Feb off-peak utilization as the most speculative revenue input; base reflects a realistic shoulder-season demand under local-resident-only patronage.

monthly_utility_overhead_dkk.rationale: Nuuk arctic heating plus centralized kiln firing during low season; Review Issue 1 flags 10% annual tariff escalation risk, so spread is wide to capture rate-volatility scenarios.

taster_conversion_actual_share.rationale: Expert Criticism names a 12.5% cut-off at which Taster outreach must redirect to digital; base sits just below the 15% target to reflect realistic conversion friction with non-arts groups.

min_viable_hourly_rate_dkk.rationale: Plan names 165 DKK/hr as the minimum viable floor; spread captures sensitivity to local resistance vs. tourist willingness-to-pay at the upper end.

taster_conversion_target_share.rationale: Plan commits to a 15% conversion target; spread reflects sensitivity to the Expert-Criticism 12.5% pivot trigger at the lower end and a stretch goal at the upper end.
